verses.quran_arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ تَبَٰرَكَ ٱلَّذِى بِيَدِهِ ٱلْمُلْكُ وَهُوَ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَىْءٍۢ قَدِيرٌ
verses.text: Blessed (be) He in whose hand is the kingdom – He is powerful over everything –

verses.quran_arabic: ٱلَّذِى خَلَقَ ٱلْمَوْتَ وَٱلْحَيَوٰةَ لِيَبْلُوَكُمْ أَيُّكُمْ أَحْسَنُ عَمَلًۭا ۚ وَهُوَ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلْغَفُورُ
verses.text: who created death and life to test which of you is best in deed – He is the Mighty, the Forgiving –

verses.quran_arabic: ٱلَّذِى خَلَقَ سَبْعَ سَمَٰوَٰتٍۢ طِبَاقًۭا ۖ مَّا تَرَىٰ فِى خَلْقِ ٱلرَّحْمَٰنِ مِن تَفَٰوُتٍۢ ۖ فَٱرْجِعِ ٱلْبَصَرَ هَلْ تَرَىٰ مِن فُطُورٍۢ
verses.text: who created seven heavens in stories (one upon another). You do not see any mistake in the creation of the Merciful. Cast your sight again! Do you see any fissure?

verses.quran_arabic: ثُمَّ ٱرْجِعِ ٱلْبَصَرَ كَرَّتَيْنِ يَنقَلِبْ إِلَيْكَ ٱلْبَصَرُ خَاسِئًۭا وَهُوَ حَسِيرٌۭ
verses.text: Then cast your sight again and again! Your sight will come crawling back to you, worn out.

verses.quran_arabic: وَلَقَدْ زَيَّنَّا ٱلسَّمَآءَ ٱلدُّنْيَا بِمَصَٰبِيحَ وَجَعَلْنَٰهَا رُجُومًۭا لِّلشَّيَٰطِينِ ۖ وَأَعْتَدْنَا لَهُمْ عَذَابَ ٱلسَّعِيرِ
verses.text: Certainly We adorned the lower heaven with lamps, and made them missiles for the satans – and We have prepared for them the punishment of the blazing (Fire).

verses.quran_arabic: وَلِلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ بِرَبِّهِمْ عَذَابُ جَهَنَّمَ ۖ وَبِئْسَ ٱلْمَصِيرُ
verses.text: For those who disbelieve in their Lord (there is) the punishment of Gehenna – and it is an evil homecoming!

verses.quran_arabic: إِذَآ أُلْقُوا۟ فِيهَا سَمِعُوا۟ لَهَا شَهِيقًۭا وَهِىَ تَفُورُ
verses.text: When they are cast into it, they will hear its panting, as it boils up

verses.quran_arabic: تَكَادُ تَمَيَّزُ مِنَ ٱلْغَيْظِ ۖ كُلَّمَآ أُلْقِىَ فِيهَا فَوْجٌۭ سَأَلَهُمْ خَزَنَتُهَآ أَلَمْ يَأْتِكُمْ نَذِيرٌۭ
verses.text: (and) nearly bursts apart from rage. Whenever a crowd is cast into it, its keepers will ask them, ‘Did a warner not come to you?’

verses.quran_arabic: قَالُوا۟ بَلَىٰ قَدْ جَآءَنَا نَذِيرٌۭ فَكَذَّبْنَا وَقُلْنَا مَا نَزَّلَ ٱللَّهُ مِن شَىْءٍ إِنْ أَنتُمْ إِلَّا فِى ضَلَٰلٍۢ كَبِيرٍۢ
verses.text: They will say, ‘Yes indeed! A warner did come to us, but we called (him) a liar, and said, “God has not sent down anything. You are simply terribly astray.”’

verses.quran_arabic: وَقَالُوا۟ لَوْ كُنَّا نَسْمَعُ أَوْ نَعْقِلُ مَا كُنَّا فِىٓ أَصْحَٰبِ ٱلسَّعِيرِ
verses.text: And they will say, ‘If (only) we had heard or understood, we would not have been among the companions of the blazing (Fire).’

verses.quran_arabic: فَٱعْتَرَفُوا۟ بِذَنۢبِهِمْ فَسُحْقًۭا لِّأَصْحَٰبِ ٱلسَّعِيرِ
verses.text: And so they confess their sin. Away with the companions of the blazing (Fire)!

verses.quran_arabic: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ يَخْشَوْنَ رَبَّهُم بِٱلْغَيْبِ لَهُم مَّغْفِرَةٌۭ وَأَجْرٌۭ كَبِيرٌۭ
verses.text: Surely those who fear their Lord in the unseen – for them (there is) forgiveness and a great reward.

verses.quran_arabic: وَأَسِرُّوا۟ قَوْلَكُمْ أَوِ ٱجْهَرُوا۟ بِهِۦٓ ۖ إِنَّهُۥ عَلِيمٌۢ بِذَاتِ ٱلصُّدُورِ
verses.text: Keep your word secret or speak it publicly – surely He knows what is in (your) hearts.

verses.quran_arabic: أَلَا يَعْلَمُ مَنْ خَلَقَ وَهُوَ ٱللَّطِيفُ ٱلْخَبِيرُ
verses.text: Does the One who created not know, when He is the Astute, the Aware?

verses.quran_arabic: هُوَ ٱلَّذِى جَعَلَ لَكُمُ ٱلْأَرْضَ ذَلُولًۭا فَٱمْشُوا۟ فِى مَنَاكِبِهَا وَكُلُوا۟ مِن رِّزْقِهِۦ ۖ وَإِلَيْهِ ٱلنُّشُورُ
verses.text: He (it is) who made the earth subservient to you. So walk about in its regions, and eat from His provision, but to Him is the raising up.

verses.quran_arabic: ءَأَمِنتُم مَّن فِى ٱلسَّمَآءِ أَن يَخْسِفَ بِكُمُ ٱلْأَرْضَ فَإِذَا هِىَ تَمُورُ
verses.text: Do you feel secure that the One who is in the sky will not cause the earth to swallow you, and then suddenly it shakes?

verses.quran_arabic: أَمْ أَمِنتُم مَّن فِى ٱلسَّمَآءِ أَن يُرْسِلَ عَلَيْكُمْ حَاصِبًۭا ۖ فَسَتَعْلَمُونَ كَيْفَ نَذِيرِ
verses.text: Or do you feel secure that the One who is in the sky will not send a sandstorm against you, and then you will know how My warning is?

verses.quran_arabic: وَلَقَدْ كَذَّبَ ٱلَّذِينَ مِن قَبْلِهِمْ فَكَيْفَ كَانَ نَكِيرِ
verses.text: Certainly those who were before them called (it) a lie, and how was My loathing (of them)?

verses.quran_arabic: أَوَلَمْ يَرَوْا۟ إِلَى ٱلطَّيْرِ فَوْقَهُمْ صَٰٓفَّٰتٍۢ وَيَقْبِضْنَ ۚ مَا يُمْسِكُهُنَّ إِلَّا ٱلرَّحْمَٰنُ ۚ إِنَّهُۥ بِكُلِّ شَىْءٍۭ بَصِيرٌ
verses.text: Do they not see the birds above them, spreading (their wings), and they fold (them)? No one holds them (up) but the Merciful. Surely He sees everything.

verses.quran_arabic: أَمَّنْ هَٰذَا ٱلَّذِى هُوَ جُندٌۭ لَّكُمْ يَنصُرُكُم مِّن دُونِ ٱلرَّحْمَٰنِ ۚ إِنِ ٱلْكَٰفِرُونَ إِلَّا فِى غُرُورٍ
verses.text: Or who is this who will be a (fighting) force for you to help you, other than the Merciful? The disbelievers are only in delusion.

verses.quran_arabic: أَمَّنْ هَٰذَا ٱلَّذِى يَرْزُقُكُمْ إِنْ أَمْسَكَ رِزْقَهُۥ ۚ بَل لَّجُّوا۟ فِى عُتُوٍّۢ وَنُفُورٍ
verses.text: Or who is this who will provide for you, if He withholds His provision? No! But they persist in (their) disdain and aversion.

verses.quran_arabic: أَفَمَن يَمْشِى مُكِبًّا عَلَىٰ وَجْهِهِۦٓ أَهْدَىٰٓ أَمَّن يَمْشِى سَوِيًّا عَلَىٰ صِرَٰطٍۢ مُّسْتَقِيمٍۢ
verses.text: Is the one who walks bent over on his face better guided, or the one who walks upright on a straight path?

verses.quran_arabic: قُلْ هُوَ ٱلَّذِىٓ أَنشَأَكُمْ وَجَعَلَ لَكُمُ ٱلسَّمْعَ وَٱلْأَبْصَٰرَ وَٱلْأَفْـِٔدَةَ ۖ قَلِيلًۭا مَّا تَشْكُرُونَ
verses.text: Say: ‘He (it is) who produced you, and made for you hearing and sight and hearts – little thanks you show!’

verses.quran_arabic: قُلْ هُوَ ٱلَّذِى ذَرَأَكُمْ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ وَإِلَيْهِ تُحْشَرُونَ
verses.text: Say: ‘He (it is) who scattered you on the earth, and to Him you will be gathered.’

verses.quran_arabic: وَيَقُولُونَ مَتَىٰ هَٰذَا ٱلْوَعْدُ إِن كُنتُمْ صَٰدِقِينَ
verses.text: They say, ‘When (will) this promise (come to pass), if you are truthful?’

verses.quran_arabic: قُلْ إِنَّمَا ٱلْعِلْمُ عِندَ ٱللَّهِ وَإِنَّمَآ أَنَا۠ نَذِيرٌۭ مُّبِينٌۭ
verses.text: Say: ‘The knowledge (of it) is only with God. I am only a clear warner.’

verses.quran_arabic: فَلَمَّا رَأَوْهُ زُلْفَةًۭ سِيٓـَٔتْ وُجُوهُ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ وَقِيلَ هَٰذَا ٱلَّذِى كُنتُم بِهِۦ تَدَّعُونَ
verses.text: When they see it near at hand, the faces of those who disbelieve will become sad, and it will be said, ‘This is what you have been calling for.’

verses.quran_arabic: قُلْ أَرَءَيْتُمْ إِنْ أَهْلَكَنِىَ ٱللَّهُ وَمَن مَّعِىَ أَوْ رَحِمَنَا فَمَن يُجِيرُ ٱلْكَٰفِرِينَ مِنْ عَذَابٍ أَلِيمٍۢ
verses.text: Say: ‘Have you considered? If God destroys me and whoever is with me, or has compassion on us, who will protect the disbelievers from a painful punishment?’

verses.quran_arabic: قُلْ هُوَ ٱلرَّحْمَٰنُ ءَامَنَّا بِهِۦ وَعَلَيْهِ تَوَكَّلْنَا ۖ فَسَتَعْلَمُونَ مَنْ هُوَ فِى ضَلَٰلٍۢ مُّبِينٍۢ
verses.text: Say: ‘He is the Merciful. We believe in Him, and in Him we put our trust. Soon you will know who it is (who is) clearly astray.’

verses.quran_arabic: قُلْ أَرَءَيْتُمْ إِنْ أَصْبَحَ مَآؤُكُمْ غَوْرًۭا فَمَن يَأْتِيكُم بِمَآءٍۢ مَّعِينٍۭ
verses.text: Say: ‘Have you considered? If one morning your water should sink (into the ground), who would bring you flowing water?’
